Start: <s val="1.5">Tutorial</s><n/><n/>You seem to be new here, let's get you through the basics.<n/>Click {#UI/Title/Ready} to start.
End: <s val="1.5">Tutorial</s><n/><n/>That's it! Remember to use the inventory to equip and unequip petals.<n/>You can click a petal to equip/unequip it.<n/><n/>Keep expanding your petal collection and good luck!
MustBeAlive: You must be alive to proceed in the tutorial.
MustBeInGame: You must be in-game for this part of the tutorial, just click the big green {#UI/Title/Ready} button.
MustLeaveGame: To proceed, abandon this game by clicking the abandon button on the top left.
Para continuar, abandone o jogo apertando no bot
